title: Files should have a newline
description: Files should end with a newlineAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Some tools work better when files end with an empty line.This rule simply generates an issue if it is missing.For example, a Git diff looks like this if the empty line is missing at the end of the file:+class Test +{ +} \ No newline at end of fileAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Detects files that do not end with a newline character. This is a file-level check that examines the entire file content.
never_trigger_on: Files that end with a newline character
logic.reasoning: This rule checks if a file ends with a newline character. Some tools (like Git) work better when files end with an empty line. The check is performed at the file level by examining the source content. Generated files are excluded to avoid false positives.
